sources.title: Man on the Run (restored) (1949, film-noir, imdb score: 6.7)
sources.description: Man on the Run is a 1949 British film noir directed by Lawrence Huntington and starring Derek Farr, Joan Hopkins, Edward Chapman, Kenneth More and Laurence Harvey.

sources.title: Man on the Run (restored, colorized) (1949, film-noir, imdb score: 6.7)
sources.description: Man on the Run is a 1949 British film noir directed by Lawrence Huntington and starring Derek Farr, Joan Hopkins, Edward Chapman, Kenneth More and Laurence Harvey.

metadata.Plot: "Man on the Run" is the definitive accounting of the 1MDB saga and an indictment of the global capitalist system and its inability to regulate itself in the face of avarice and corruption.
metadata.Writer: Cassius Michael Kim, Karl Dawson, Alyse Shorland
metadata.Actors: Bill McMurry, Sharon Carpenter, Jennifer Peros
